---
title: "Publications"
toc: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(RefManageR)

BibOptions(
  check.entries   = FALSE,
  style           = "html",
  bib.style       = "authoryear",
  sorting         = "ydnt",
  no.print.fields = c("file", "urldate", "keywords", "abstract",
                      "copyright", "issn", "language", "publisher")
)

bib <- ReadBib("references.bib", check = FALSE)

# Extract year for each entry (NULL/missing becomes "n.d.")
get_year <- function(i) {
  yr <- bib[[i]]$year
  if (is.null(yr) || nchar(trimws(yr)) == 0) "n.d." else trimws(yr)
}

all_years <- sapply(seq_along(bib), get_year)

# Numeric years descending, then "n.d." last
numeric_years <- sort(unique(as.integer(all_years[all_years != "n.d."])),
                      decreasing = TRUE)
year_order    <- c(as.character(numeric_years),
                   if (any(all_years == "n.d.")) "n.d.")

for (yr in year_order) {
  idx    <- which(all_years == yr)
  label  <- if (yr == "n.d.") "No date" else yr
  cat(paste0("\n## ", label, "\n\n"))
  PrintBibliography(bib[idx])
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```
